prompt: Using REFERENCE_1 as the main character and pose reference, turn the boxed figure photo into a clean high-resolution anime key visual: remove the retail packaging, shelves, hand, labels, and all product-box text, and render only the character as a polished 2D illustration. Add a dark starry void background with neon purple motion arcs, cinematic highlights, and smooth detailed fabric folds. No logos, no typography, no store environment.
